negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_110
prompt: The video opens with a wide shot of a snowy mountain slope under a partly cloudy sky, capturing a serene winter scene. Four skiers are descending the slope, each contributing to the dynamic yet peaceful atmosphere. In the foreground, the skier in bright red pants and a dark jacket uses ski poles for balance as they glide down the hill. To the left, a skier in yellow pants and a black jacket follows closely behind. Further back, two more skiers are visible: one in blue and the other in black, both moving at a steady pace. The background showcases a range of snow-capped mountains, adding depth and grandeur to the scene.  As the video progresses, the skier in red pants continues to descend, maintaining a steady pace, while the skier in yellow pants follows closely. The skier in blue moves further ahead, and the skier in black stays close to them. The camera captures the skiers' descent from a consistent angle, emphasizing their movement against the backdrop of the expansive, snow-covered mountains. By the final frame, the skier in red pants has moved further down the slope, leaving the others behind, while the skiers in blue and black continue their descent, and the skier in yellow pants follows the central skier.
